title: senecio tenuifolius
intro: Senecio tenuifolius, also known as the Narrow-leaved Ragwort, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senecio tenuifolius include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from fever and pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
